query: 2026 Florida Republican gubernatorial primary status: Byron Donalds candidacy, opponents, Trump endorsement, polling, competitors dropping out. Who is running against Donalds and what are the polls showing as of mid-2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on the 2026 Florida Republican gubernatorial primary as of mid-2026:

**Byron Donalds is the dominant frontrunner** with Trump's endorsement (held since he entered in February 2025). Prediction markets price his nomination at ~96%.

**Who's running against him** (all polling in low single digits, none dropping out):
- Lt. Gov. Jay Collins (DeSantis appointee) — refuses to exit
- James Fishback — facing residency-eligibility questions
- Paul Renner — former House Speaker, running attack ads

**Casey DeSantis never entered** — hypothetical polls showed her trailing badly (7% vs. Donalds' 44%).

**Field consolidation via endorsements, not dropouts:** In early July 2026, DeSantis's own cabinet appointees (AG Uthmeier, CFO Ingoglia, Ag Commissioner) plus Senate President Albritton endorsed Donalds — though Gov. DeSantis himself still hasn't.

**Polling:** Donalds leads by ~40+ points across all pollsters (46% Emerson March, 54% AIF/Fabrizio June, +39 Change Research May). He raised a record ~$22M in Q1 2026.

Full report, sourced key facts, and structured data points have been delivered via the StructuredOutput tool.

key_facts: Florida primary is August 18, 2026; general election November 3, 2026; DeSantis is term-limited.
Byron Donalds entered the race February 25, 2025, already holding Trump's full endorsement (Trump pledged it via Truth Social in February 2025).
As of July 10, 2026, Polymarket gives Donalds ~96% to win the GOP primary nomination.
Opponents still running against Donalds: Lt. Gov. Jay Collins, investor James Fishback, and former FL House Speaker Paul Renner — all polling in low single digits.
Jay Collins explicitly refused to drop out: 'I am not jumping into a congressional race.'
Casey DeSantis never entered the race; hypothetical polls showed her far behind Donalds (7% vs 44% in Emerson).
In early July 2026, DeSantis cabinet appointees (AG James Uthmeier, CFO Blaise Ingoglia, Ag Commissioner) and Senate President Ben Albritton endorsed Donalds.
Gov. Ron DeSantis himself has still not endorsed Donalds as of mid-2026.
AIF/Fabrizio poll (June 3-7, 2026): Donalds 54%, Fishback 8%, Collins 5%, Renner 2%, undecided 31%.
Emerson poll (March 29-31, 2026): Donalds 46%, Collins 4%, Fishback 4%, undecided 39%.
Change Research (May 13-16, 2026): Donalds led GOP primary by ~39 points; David Jolly leads Democratic primary.
Donalds raised a record ~$22 million in Q1 2026; later reports cite cumulative fundraising over $81 million.
James Fishback faces questions over Florida's 7-year residency requirement (registered to vote in two states).
The general election is rated Solid/Safe Republican by Cook Political Report and Inside Elections.
